creator: ds@ukrhub.net
text:
Russian translation of articles/fbsd-from-scratch has become outdated due to changes in the original document.

Fix: 

There is a patch in http://chaos.ukrhub.net/FDP/doc.ru.articles.fbsd-from-scratch.diff.tbz that may fix the problem.
How-To-Repeat:   Compare the revision of
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/fbsd-from-scratch/article.sgml
  and 'Original revision' in
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/doc/ru_RU.KOI8-R/articles/fbsd-from-scratch/article.sgml?rev=1.4;content-type=text%2Fplain
